title: XFORT Bello Entrance Knob Set Polished Brass, Door Knob with Lock for Internal Wooden Doors, Complete Set with Tubular Latch and 3 Keys
features: FUNCTION: The Bello Entrance Knob Set offers security and convenience for your internal wooden doors. With an internal snib and external key locking mechanism, it ensures safety and privacy, making it perfect for bedroom and office doors.

COMPOSITION: Crafted from durable stainless steel, this knob set guarantees reliability and longevity. The material's strength and resilience make it suitable for regular use, providing lasting security for your doors.

APPLICATIONS: Ideal for internal wooden doors with a thickness of 35-50mm, the Entrance Knob Set is versatile and adaptable. Whether installed on bedroom doors, office doors, or any other internal door requiring security, it offers peace of mind and convenience.
FITTINGS: The Entrance Knob Set comes complete with all necessary fixtures and fittings for easy installation. Included are color-matched screws, a tubular latch, and three keys.

HANDING THE POWER TO YOU: XFORT is a brand synonymous with quality and innovation, that strives to make DIY more accessible and less intimidating to the everyday person. With expert guidance and quality products, our goal is to support your DIY journey every step of the way.
